description:
Administrative document, possibly. In Arabic script. Specific genre and purpose unclear. Mentions garments and fabrics (kiswa. . . mandīl sūsī. . . .) and the phrase فوجد الذي باسم المذكور من. 

On verso some magical doodles and some names in Judaeo-Arabic: Kulayb, Sittūna, Thamna(?) bt. Levi, Sitt al-Ahl, Waḥshiyya(?), Abū l-Khayr. Needs further examination.
description_he: מסמך ממלכתי בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
